bounties.title: PvP Damage Rebalancing
bounties.description: Server-side mod to reduce player-vs-player damage for longer firefights. Configurable multiplier. Must NOT touch PvE damage. Every PvP server admin wants this — existing mods are all dead.

bounties.title: Linkable Craft-From-Containers
bounties.description: Wire specific containers to specific workstations — like the electrical system but for crafting. Chain stations: Forge → Mixer → Workbench. Not global access. Nothing like this exists yet.

bounties.title: Zombie Block Damage Control
bounties.description: Disable or zero-out zombie block damage without breaking AI pathfinding. Removing "destroyblocks" from XML freezes zombies entirely. Existing Nexus mods are outdated or broken.

bounties.title: Weather System Restoration
bounties.description: V2.0 removed dynamic weather. Players want rain, snow, and fog back — affecting gameplay, temperature, and biome hazards. Some community attempts exist but quality varies wildly.

bounties.title: Modular Clothing Return
bounties.description: V2.0 replaced mix-and-match clothing with preset outfits. Players want individual piece selection back, plus immersive badge replacements (gas masks, filters instead of magic badges).

bounties.title: Server-Side Mod Discovery
bounties.description: Server admins can't find compatible server-side mods. No curated source exists — they bounce between Nexus, forums, and GitHub hoping things work. Need a version-tagged, searchable mod library.

bounties.title: PvE/PvP Zone Management
bounties.description: Hybrid servers need clean per-zone PvP toggling. Safe zones around traders, PvP in wilderness. Currently requires complex CSMM/CPM config with no visual interface.

bounties.title: Server as System Service
bounties.description: Running 7D2D as a proper service (auto-restart, start on boot) is surprisingly hard. KitsuneCommand already handles server lifecycle management out of the box.

bounties.title: Shared Map Exploration
bounties.description: Co-op players exploring in different directions can't share discovered map data. Need party-synced fog-of-war or a craftable "map table" where players merge their maps.

bounties.title: Working Devices / Functional Furniture
bounties.description: Coffee machines, ovens, appliances as functional crafting stations. JaxTeller718's beloved mod broke in V2.x. Community wants it updated or rebuilt. "It's the little things."

bounties.title: Drone Crafting Rebalance
bounties.description: Drones are too easy to acquire. Needs higher crafting requirements per quality tier — more robotics parts, electronics. A progression balance mod, not removal.

bounties.title: Forge Slots & Inventory Expansion
bounties.description: Returning players want 3 forge slots (was available pre-V1.0), more backpack slots, and more vehicle storage. Simple XML mods but hard to find updated V2.x versions.

bounties.title: Server-Side Content Limits & EAC Compatibility Guide
bounties.description: Server admins need clarity on what can be modded server-side (XML, Harmony) without requiring clients to download assets (icons, models, sounds) and which modifications break EAC. A definitive reference would prevent wasted effort and improve public server onboarding.

bounties.title: Vending Machine Overhaul (Wilderness Loot & Economy)
bounties.description: Make wilderness vending machines more immersive: working VMs accept old cash at scaled prices without restocking, broken VMs salvage for food/drinks with bonuses. Adds economy depth and salvage gameplay variety.

bounties.title: Toggle Trader Protection Zones
bounties.description: Server admins want to disable trader area protection to clean up trash/broken blocks, then optionally re-enable it to prevent zombie damage. Current system locks edits permanently.

bounties.title: Player-Requested Airdrops via Flares
bounties.description: Replace automatic airdrops with craftable flares that players throw to call drops within 12-24 hours. Different flare colors request specific supplies (weapons, food, medical). Adds strategic resource control.

bounties.title: 5.1/7.1 Surround Sound Enabler
bounties.description: Enable multichannel audio output for better spatial awareness (especially zombies behind you). Current stereo-only output wastes speaker systems and gives poor directional cues for headphone users.
